auth.nicknameIntro: Before your first action, choose the nickname you will appear with publicly.

addDoctor.title: Add a doctor or clinic
addDoctor.intro: Can't find your doctor? Add them using public information. The profile is reviewed by moderators before being published.
addDoctor.clinicPlaceholder: Pick an existing clinic or type the name
addDoctor.confirmPublic: I confirm this is publicly available information
addDoctor.success: Thank you! The profile will be reviewed within 48 hours.
addDoctor.errorRateLimited: You have submitted too many proposals today. Try again tomorrow.

about.title: About us
about.missionText: Vleresomjekun exists for one reason: so that every Albanian, before a medical visit, can read the real experiences of other patients. Like Trustpilot for businesses, but for Albanian healthcare.
about.freeText: The platform has no ads, sells no sponsored profiles, and never deletes reviews for payment. Nothing. This is the foundation of our credibility: we have nothing to sell you. Doctors cannot pay to look better.
about.published1: It describes a direct experience as a patient (or accompanying a family member)
about.published2: It is verified via SMS code (OTP)
about.published3: It is at least 30 characters long
about.removed1: It contains personal insults, threats or hate speech
about.removed2: It is not about a medical experience (e.g. political or personal comments)
about.removed3: It contains health data of identifiable third parties
about.removed4: It is demonstrably false or part of a coordinated scheme
about.removed5: It contains full names of patients
about.notRemovedTitle: A review is NOT removed if:
about.notRemoved1: It is negative but describes a real experience
about.notRemoved2: The doctor disputes it without evidence
about.notRemoved3: It is written with grammar mistakes or a harsh but non-offensive tone
about.moderationText: Automatic filters catch suspicious patterns (copy-paste texts, many reviews from the same source) and send them to manual review. Reports are handled within 48 hours. Negative reviews are never deleted just because they are 'inconvenient' — only those breaking the rules above are removed.
about.anonymityText: Your phone number is verified via SMS but never stored in readable form and never published anywhere. Only the nickname you choose is shown. This way you can write freely and safely.
about.contactText: For questions, reports or data corrections:

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.text: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
